author: y4rr
content:
Closed APPROVE — 5 torchvision-canonical pretrained models pinned end-to-end via the new reusable infrastructure.

HF uploads (ferrotorch/ org, verified via /api/models/<repo>):
- ssd300_vgg16 sha256=2db78702...09dfe (143 MB)
- fasterrcnn_resnet50_fpn sha256=40989f39...bc53 (167 MB)
- maskrcnn_resnet50_fpn sha256=b5d943cf...8fe5 (178 MB)
- deeplabv3_resnet50 sha256=88133b09...75dc1 (159 MB)
- fcn_resnet50 sha256=8419d91a...dabf7 (132 MB)

Implementation:
- scripts/pin_pretrained_weights.py (~600 LoC) — reusable per-model registry with strict mapping fns; hard-fails on key-set mismatch; injects verbatim BSD-3-Clause torchvision 0.21 license into every README.
- ferrotorch-vision/examples/dump_torchvision_keys.rs — promoted from untracked to committed; serves as the authoritative ferrotorch named_parameters() ground-truth dump for future pin updates.
- ferrotorch-hub/src/registry.rs — 5 placeholder SHAs replaced + num_parameters corrected to exact sum(p.numel()) per torchvision (~35M/41.7M/44.4M/42M/35.3M).
- ferrotorch-hub/tests/pretrained_loading.rs — 5 #[ignore]-gated smoke tests at the SafeTensors → StateDict layer (canary keys + shape + nonzero-data verification). Avoided ferrotorch-vision dep cycle.
- ferrotorch-hub/tests/conformance/fixtures.json + scripts/regenerate_hub_fixtures.py — updated to match new registry state (count 19→20, num_parameters corrections, ssd300_vgg16 entry added).

Honest disclosures (structural, not silent):
- FPN bias drop (8 keys × 2 detection models): ferrotorch FPN uses bias=false vs torchvision bias=true; documented in HF READMEs.
- aux_classifier drop (7 keys × 2 segmentation models): ferrotorch DeepLabV3/FCN don't expose optional aux head; documented.
- ResNet-50 fc head random fill: torchvision detection/segmentation models discard the backbone's fc head; ferrotorch ResNet-50 always instantiates it; subagent uses torch.manual_seed(0) to make the fill deterministic so SHAs reproduce.

Verification:
- 5 SHAs verified verbatim in registry.rs.
- HF API confirms all 5 repos have model.safetensors + README.md uploaded.
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-hub --tests: 129 passed (94+34+1); 5 ignored (the new network-gated smoke tests).
- cargo test --ignored: all 5 pretrained_loading tests pass.
- Build + clippy -D warnings clean.
- Sabotage probe (mutate 1 SHA char) captured verbatim 'SHA-256 mismatch' panic + revert green.

Dispatch took 4 attempts: HF org missing → user created; token scope missing → user fixed; rate limit → waited; success. Opus subagent maintained probe-before-fix discipline through all STOPs.

UNet remains the only placeholder in the registry (no canonical public mirror — separate user decision). #1130 closes entirely. No follow-ups filed.
